Name: ReinforceParamWeapon
Description: Defines upgrades of weapons, include stat changes and upgrade cost (EquipMtrlSetParam id offset)

Fields.Name: Correction %: STR
Fields.Description: Correction value of muscle strength correction

Fields.Name: Correction %: INT
Fields.Description: Correction value of magic power correction

Fields.Name: Behavior SpEffect [1] Offset
Fields.Description: Addition correction value for special effect ID1

Fields.Description: Addition correction value for special effect ID2

Fields.Name: Behavior SpEffect [3] Offset
Fields.Description: Addition correction value for special effect ID3

Fields.Name: Passive SpEffect [1] Offset
Fields.Description: Addition correction value for resident special effect ID1

Fields.Description: Addition correction value for resident special effect ID2

Fields.Name: Passive SpEffect [3] Offset
Fields.Description: Addition correction value for resident special effect ID3

Fields.Name: Reinforcement Material Set Offset
Fields.Description: Addition correction value of material parameter ID

Fields.Name: Max Reinforcement Level
Fields.Description: Level value for maximum enhanced weapon level

Fields.Name: Reinforce Price Rate
Fields.Description: Correction value to multiply the enhancement price of the weapon parameter

Fields.Name: Base Change Price Rate
Fields.Description: Correction value to multiply the evolution price of the weapon parameter
